star_1.text: Edit....I thought I would give this game another shot. Waste of time. Worse then the first time. Way too many ads. It downloaded 3 games from the ads that I didn't want. Save your time and skip it. Uninstalling immediately. It's just ok. Controls are very unresponsive. I swipe to jump or slide and it only works about half the time. I'm betting it's designed that way on purpose to get you to spend money. Way to many ads even for a "free" game.

Had uninstalled previously due to issues with challenges not completing. Turns out after all these years they still don't save your currencies and event progress to your account. Everything was lost there. Purchase restoring doesn't work still either. I got stuck with two impossible challenges to complete to increase my level as well. If you plan to play, NEVER uninstall the app. Supposedly they fixed one issue, but I can't tell because everything else for me is gone.

This was a fun game for so long. Sadly, not anymore. Cheif among the frustrations is that special maps you purchase that once could be used for daily objectives no longer work that way. You pay money for a map that you can't even use. For beginners, the play free feature that shows you ads and then doesn't actually give you a new life will be equally frustrating. It might not be worth the aggravation to install the game.

This used to be my favorite game. But since I upgraded my phone, the game won't work. I was really irritated when I lost my coins, gems, etc. even after making sure everything was saved.But now I can't even play the game! When the game actually opens, the tilt doesn't work. Most of the time it won't open. I've sent numerous feedback msgs regarding these problems and nothing has been done. (This has been happening for at least 4 months.) I will be happy to give 5 stars again if this is fixed.

I dislike this game because it has the same problem for the 1st one, every time I play this game it will only let my character go straigt, it won't let it go from side to side to collect coin. Also the continue free doesn't even work. Each time I touch it, I can watch the video, but when it gets to the game, it says video doesn't work and only gives me the chance to use the diamonds.

The original came out when I was in middle school. Figured I'd give it another try since it was so fun then. I've been graduated for 2 years now, is there really an excuse for the lagging? It's very scummy that the characters movements take a second to mimick the action of the player. This game is fast paced, there should be no lag at all. It sets the player up for failure. I couldn't play more than twice because of it. Very irritating and plain boring. It was better when I was 11.

The app doesn't load, typically after updating. VERY FRUSTRATING. If you reinstall, you loose your coins and Gems. As long as this game has been available, you would think they could get it right rather than putting out buggy code. Support is worthless. It has been months, and the program still only loads in airplane mode. However, even in airplane mode, it sometimes cannot move the character right or left.

The latest upgrades are choppy and you crash alot. It's difficult to complete the challenges.  Also, on the treasure chests, how come the totems/artifacts aren't available?  I'm tired of always getting tokens for the new characters. Why can't you integrate more chances to get the artifacts needed to complete levels? I've been stuck on level 11 for months due to the lack of certain artifacts. Very frustrating.

changed my review due to predatory ads. I have had to start over 3 times tonight. I had collected 3 totems, 5 gems, at least 6 chests and I lost count of how many hammers I had earned. also, I beat my highest score. all this, only to have an ad wipe it all out. it was a marble game ad that would not allow me to exit out of it so I could claim everything I earned. I had to close out tge game and restart and lost everything. then it happened a second and third time. I have deleted the game.

Company filled it with ads after it was perfectly fine for years. I understand that updating with phone software comes with costs, but if you don't want to pay them, just let the game deprecate. advertising is a bubble waiting to pop at this point.

when the founder of this game is focused on licking Ad sponsors boots how will this game cater to our needs and challenges. One junk of a game inspite of decades of presence in market i'm still facing tech bugs where TILT option gets freezed for no reason at all and dies and to revive we need to watch 3 to 5 minutes ads which sucks to the core. Never seen a game app promoting so many other games. If your intention is to satisfy your ad sponsors why dont you ask your sponsors only to play!

this game used to be my favourite game I had 116 gems and I bought the map called lost jungle and once I tapped on it I could not buy it and I tapped on it again then 100 of my gems were gone instead of 50 gems . Also I bought a map called enchanted temple I jumped on the treasure chest and I couldn't get it . I am really disappointed please solve this issue .
i love this game! it brings back my inner child while playing it lol and what i love the most in temple run is the seasonal updates and events. especially the graphics, it's so realistic!

Very irritating the way it just stops at level 10 and unable to get the bonus gem which used to make the game a bit more fun, also not much you can do with gems and coi s once you've bought them, very dissapointing

this game sucks it cheats in the global challenge everytime I get a score it's start to jump all the time or does not slide under obstacles the ads section is also very bad does not even want to show ads when you unlock scrolls in temple pass try again over and over again the runners section is a mess power ups is broken their is a reason this game only got a 4.2 rating

garbage adverts, you can't skip them, you have to interact with them. absolute rubbish. I appreciate the game is ad driven, but I don't need whatever thing you're shilling rammed down my neck. hard pass.

not as good as 2012, plus why more characters? Just keep the originals, plus why when you go to characters, you gotta scroll down instead of scrolling right also why do you have to remove my characters that I owned from 2012 like for example, I had every scary character and then boom! there gone. also, why can't i change my characters power? edit: one thing for sure "temple run" as I write this on Feb 10th 2026, YOU NEED TO ADD KARMA LEE DRAGON DANCER PLEASE! ITS THE RIGHT TIME TO ADD IT!

l personally don't like this because of its new update and its new version ,I like the older version of this game.I uninstall this game because new version and suggest all the people who come to install it don't install it and also request the developer of these to change the graphics of game and make the just as looks in old version.

im having problems with the Ads..I have to close the game to get out of the advert as it just stays there ??boring and I now play less.still the same as they haven't fixed it..like they are trying to force me to download other games..don't really play now.
first time starting the app and they immediately ask me to watch an add before anything else. not only that but the adds they give you FORCE you to go back to playstore. the games just not worth it.

star_2.text: latest update (11/25) removed the ability to change runner power ups. this is really a bad move. please bring the runner power up selection back! from the looks of recent reviews, I'm not the only one who finds this change unacceptable! Been playing this game for years. Best game out there! The usual ads but that's to be expected unless you pay for ad removal. Lots of fun to pass the time

I used to play this have a lot. I was trying to get into it again, but the ads have almost made the game unable. They have three different x's and have multiple waiting periods between them. and this is after every death. My kids wanted to try it and they are new at it so they die often, and they spend more time in ads than the game. Not worth it any more. Edit: I understand ads are required to make money... the ads for this game were just worse than any other AP I have come into contact with.

I like this game. It's addicting and entertaining. The global challenges are hard but fun to try. BUT the Ads are execxisve and they dont even have a sound off option. I play while listening to audiobooks. The ads don't pause the audio automatically the way a notification would, and when the ad is on the screen, there's no "off" to turn off the sound. It's so loud too.

I used to love this game, i really did. However there was a large update a few years ago that made the menu extremely difficult to navigate, there's so many more adds, and my progress got practically removed. OH YEAH and i can't even find map options! But oh we have COIN SKINS. I wish i could go back to the old menu, i could actually use it normally. This game makes me really sad, i don't like the direction it went at all.

Not over challenging. Good game to kill time with. Update 9/18/2025. Game sucks. Went through an update I lost half the characters I already won. I had over 65k gems lost all those. Cannot choose which power up the character uses, what is shown in their profile is not what is active in the play screen. Way to ruin something that was fine as is. Don't download.

I grew up playing Temple Run and absolutely loved it. Temple Run 2 was even better because it had more characters. I especially loved Karma Lee and her Shadow Walker outfit. Still do, but now the game itself isn't as good as it used to be. The game looks pixelly, the menu screen has waaaayyy too much going on, there's a new pets thing I can't figure out, the simple old menu that I loved is just gone. I'm so disappointed! I'll still play but it's just not as fun as it used to be.

Mindless, challenging fun. I enjoyed this game since 2013, but am giving up on it. The advertisements have become increasingly frustrating and intrusive, and my account was reset back to nothing unlocked. I was always a F2P player, but the game no longer holds my attention enough to make me interested in trying to recollect everything to where I'd been.

I have been playing this game for YEARS and I've always loved it. However the newest update has been VERY disappointing. If I pause a run why cant I see any challenges but the level up ones that I don't really care about doing? Also why can't I change the way the coins look anymore? Why is the menu so confusing and why do I only get one daily chest from completing challenges instead of the 2 I used to be able to get? Please just go back to how it used to be. Didn't need to be changed to be good.

The gameplay itself is fine - simple and responsive. The ads really hinder my ability to enjoy this game, though. Have to sit through an ad after every one, maybe two, runs before it'll let me start another one and, at least the ones I've gotten, they're unskippable. I get that there's an options to pay for no ads, but the default has them well in excess.

No longer as fun as it used to be. It's more difficult to play, I can no longer reach 25k meters on a causal play. I'm lucky to to reach 10k now.I don't know why they changed the system used, the old one was great. The new menu is ok I guess. Seems like they are trying to appeal to kids especially with the new map. Karma Lee shadow walker is my favorite character outfit and in the update the hood has been removed. It doesn't appear as a hat and when I press no hat it's just her hair. Sad.

Bought new phone couple times. Everything transfers but diamonds earned..also once you reach certain level you can't go any further..also the the xtra things you earn for different levels don't come up as often as use to. Also daily challenges can't be met because they don't come up like diamonds.etc..no matter how far you run...game is full of ads that are long..some can be muted ...some hard to get back to game...JUST RECENTLY VOLCANO ISLAND UPLOADED AND STOLE ALL MY GEMS AND COINS .

It's a classic. Entertaining game. But the sheer quantity of ads is a bit out of control. There is an ad between every run. So if in one day I do 30 runs, I'll have watched 30 advertisements. I find that excessive and unfair. Decreased rating from 3 to 2 stars due to lack of support from the developers toward users.

Once upon a time, a great timekiller with balanced gameplay. Idk what you've been doing in the year that I haven't had the game, but you guys did smth to screw it up. It took two tries to even get to the home screen the first time. Came back an hour later and it won't open after 10+ tries. Well, it opened for like, five seconds once, then closed on me again. Someone let me know when they get their stuff together again and I'll consider picking this up again.

Unfortunately, the game is not playable anymore. When you select to play ADS, it does not take you back to where you were at it. Restarts the game completely over again, which ruins the whole entire process of you playing the progressive game secondly. Even when you do not select to see an ad, it automatically takes you into the ad.And it's still take you from the progress you just did.It is completely stupid and useless to play a game.Will you have to start all over again.
great game but the ads can't be closed down, they just redirect to the app store and then you have to close the game and reopen to ne able to continue

I play this almost everyday and think about buying the app then they do an upgrade and the game goes in the toilet. They'll add a decent feature (runner selection) and screw it up by no longer allowing you to choose your power up. They add the annoying axe collection, so you can't collect other items without playing for an hour. Why the timed CONTINUE option? Dumb. So many things messed up right now.

The game need resolution improvement. textures need to be sharpen. I am s25 ultra user. the game is kind of nostalgia for me. I am missing the sharp textures It used to be back in old days. Give 120 fps support as well

I like the game i really do. I simply don't agree with locking power ups to characters. For example, Karma Lee's Shadow Walker skin is locked with the Bonus Score power. I'd much rather have bonus coins or dash with her especially because her jumping animation is so unique. Please, return the power ups to their original function.

The default gyro conrtols is terrible. Unable to enjoy the game. There seems to be no option for controls. I want to lay in bed and flick the screen left and right instead of having my wrist twist left and right.

Halloween graphic hurts the eyes and too hard to see. Gems are too far apart so are too hard to get (only had a total of 5 in the last 4 weeks). So to re unlock the next map will take atleast 2 years running 50,000m a week, and that is if I don't spend any. Now one of other maps has gone and I have to buy it again. Add another couple of years to buy that one back too. Can't level up until I buy the map to complete the challenge. I will have given up on the game long before that.

star_3.text: The first one is better. Temple Run 2 has some things that are better, like more obstacles and maps, but I feel like the pacing isn't as good. It just feels slower. Too slow. It's a little hard to explain, but this second one also feels more repetitive. The transitions around turns are also smoother in the first one. And, the animations for powerups look better in the first one. So, it's decent, but I like the first Temple Run more. I would give more detail, but I'm at the max letter amount.

Addicting game! and I'm not the gaming type at all. The graphics are great. That said, the controls glitching gets my character killed more than honest mistakes. Half the time when I swipe left or right to turn, the game doesn't register that I did. Or there are new elements halfway through that tutorials did not prepare for. The ads are longer than a typical life, also. Concept? 5*. Controls & ad overkill? Knocked it to 3* (I almost put 2*). 😒

I've played Temple Run since the first one came out. I've always loved playing it. And I love how they made the main menu easier. However I extracted 2 stars for 3 reasons. 1 it's a bad idea to get the sprit booster after 10,000m. (it will likely put you in a position to die) Second the way the new font is just bugs me for some reason. Third they trippled the adds. Still a great game and I love it.

I really REALLY love this game. It's addicting, challenging, but doable. However, I am updating my review today because it's frustrating when they give you a daily goal of riding the mine cart and then fix the game so you can't possibly get to the mine no matter which way you go. Sorry, TEMPLE RUN 2, that takes you from a fantastic 5 star to an average 3 star.

Great game, I kill a lot of time with this. However my biggest complaint is that I figured spending $5.99 to get the Gold Edition would make it ad-free. However it's the Fools-Gold Edition because you just get some add-ons in game. But they never specifically stated it would be ad free if I paid so that's on me.

I've always been a fan of TR2, but ever since daily quests were introduced game play is clearly being manipulated. Quest is to ride the minecart 5 times? Ok, we'll make sure they don't see a minecart for the first 25,000 meters. Collect 5000 coins on the waterslide? Ok, we'll give them waterslides but make sure they're really short so it takes forever to get to 5000 coins. I am not a fan of these tactics. Don't act like you're not manipulating game play like this because we both know you are.

Ok.. so this game, I'll personally say that I love alot, and used to play everyday when I was young. I kinda feel bad writing this because I downloaded this again, AND, everything has TOTALLY changed. I really loved the older version of it and would request you to bring back. And yes, in the new Valentine's update, the thing that really annoyed me is that there's a global challenge in which you're supposed to get a reward after completing, and I completed it, still got nothing :( please fix it.

I love this game. I play it everyday on my way to and from work. My issue is with the characters. There's too many of them, and it's difficult to navigate through it. They don't have special abilities or anything too, just there for vibes or what? How about a few characters with different costume options, or make it easier to navigate through them. Maybe in list form instead?

The latest update seems not to be well thought through and very buggy. On the plus side, it is now much easier to find a character/costume. On the minus side the character ability bears no relationship to the one you get during play and there is no way to change it, so you have to randomly select characters and start a run just to see what you've got this time. The facility to enhance the ability with gems has disappeared. It would be better if the characters were grouped. Android 13 phone.

everything is okay the game mode is too cool but when we back the game and don't clear from the sides the data will be reset and all the claims chest and diamonds and coins which I win from the game reset

basic game from my childhood. you get what you asked for. I just want to say that when I downloaded it I started getting spammed with ads on my socials for this game. like I already downloaded it why are you sending me ads. because if this I'm deleting the game. don't pmo
would be nice if collecting 2 gems for a daily challenge, that there were gems to be found. went 50,000 meters and didn't see a single gem!!!

I love this game. but right now, it won't let me watch ads on the advent calender. it will only let me get the main un Lock but not the videos to uncover the hidden item. now it won't let me watch ANY videos for ANYTHING whether it be for double coins on temple pass, the advent calender or gems

Dear TR2 Team Everything was great until you changed the runners. Players no longer have the opportunity to change the power up abilities to meet the specific daily challenges. I am unable to see what particular power up each runner has now and I find that I have to go through each one to know thier power up ability. This feature was working well for me before the change/update. Sorry to say, I'm losing my interest in this game, the excitement is slowly waning. Thanks for the memories.

It can be fun... And frustrating! I have played this game for a short time and all having fun with it. I'm not the best (I would never claim to be) but I don't think I'm that bad either. I have reached level 6 with ease and got lots of gems too. My only gripe with this game (the only reason it gets a 4) is when the controls send me hurtling to my death in one form or another. I click up only to be flung into the wall... I try to turn only to jump to my death. I understand the need for difficulty and really do enjoy the game but these problems really make me so playing for an hour or so to calm down. Edit: (*lost a star) since the last update the map for pirate cove had been significantly reduced, it used to have many branching paths and loads of choice but these have all been taken away and it is just a skin of other less impressive maps... Bring back the massive maps with plenty of choices hiding in the sides and the rating will go up

Everything else is perfect; the game is regularly updated, there are no glitches or anything, but can you make it so that the progress we've had on a device be transferrable to another? It says it uses Google Play to save your progress, but only the purchases could be restored, all the characters, upgrades, etc could not be. It's annoying to keep on starting on square one when you've actually been playing it for years.

been playing for years, suddenly we can not change what runner power we are using? I have really enjoyed this game over the years, but this must be fixed. the new menu for runners, hats, and pets does not allow you to change runner power anymore.

I really love this game but since I'm playing it for years now I have nothing left to ”do”. Just running to improve my score takes too much time. There is nothing else I can achieve, I have all upgrades, collectables and achievements. The daily goals always repeat themselves so mean nothing and global challenges are fake and mostly give diamonds I have a ton of. So I'm currently not playing it anymore.
after the new update there is no option for changing the runner ability. Rest all the game is good and fun I hope by the next update the players should be able to change the runner ability

Okay since imangi added the ost for the maps back. I will give this game a higher review, although there are still problems, like with the UI and AI images. This game is a pretty solid sequel. With a bunch of more characters, most of them feel unique instead of just remodels, and the maps have a great atmosphere as well! Although the second game is slower and easier than the first. Which kinda removes the challenge. Overall this game has really good cosmetics but is easier than the first.

star_4.text: Chill with the ads, I understand the need for it during extended play, but I swear going from one page of the menu to the next may or may not cue some random ad. And now the ads aren't just video, but video and about 15 seconds of "tempting" play. No I don't want to solve the puzzle. Thanks. (Other than that the game is fine.)

With most games, sooner or later, I feel I've gotten all the enjoyment I can out of it, and I uninstall to make room for something else. Temple Run 2 always manages to add some new and fun tweak to keep me coming back. One new QOL feature it desperately needs: an easier method to select a character or hat other than going through one by one, which takes too long thanks to the sheer numbers. Add that for five stars.

This is a pretty awesome game, and I love it! I think that having so many characters is kinda odd, because you only ever see their backs while running. There are ads but if you just turn on Airplane Mode they're gone. I don't like how rare jewels/gems are, and that it costs 500 to unlock a new biome. But I would advise it, great game overall.

I love this game, but there are some issues with it. About once a week my character gets stuck on one side. I have to completely shut down the game for to work properly. Also some of the daily challenges are way to long, where they take several games to complete. I'd like to see challenges that you can complete quickly. Other than that I love all the new characters and maps!

This game is a hoot. One of my go-to's for entertainment on business trips. Love the graphics and animation, new challenges daily, new gains to make daily, and these runs are just plain fun in themselves. Sometimes, the app doesn't "hear" my commands, and instead of a sharp right turn, my character ends up launching herself off a cliff.  "YAAAAAAHHHHH....." Oops! ...probably more of a problem with the touch screen.  The big upgrades are paid for with "gems", which is usually a red flag for a cash grab game, but in this case, the gems come at a reasonable rate in normal game play to let you play successfully without spending real world dollars. But you have the option to speed things along if you care to spend some buckazoids.  The ads don't bother me. They help pay for the game, and I like seeing previews of other games I might enjoy.  Overall, nice game, that I intend to continue playing. Thanks!

I've always enjoyed this game. It's generally fun, the courses are varied, and the graphics are bright and pop well. I will say, the new course (jade something) that's supposed to have an orient/asia feel is a disappointment. It's very repetitive, reminding me of the earliest version of the original course. Otherwise, a great game!

This game is great. It has amazing graphics, controls and gameplay for this type of running game. It updates frequently, and at the time I am posting this, the Frozen Festival Christmas 'Santa's Little Helper' event has just ended. The only reason that I didn't rate it 5/5 is because there are condtant ad pop-ups. Otherwise, this is a brilliantly addictive time killer!

I love the frozen shadows map, but the challenges and objectives need reworked. They're almost all for sky summit, they're in multiple places, some are skippable and some aren't. Of my current 3, 2 are artifact related and artifacts won't spawn until you collect EVERY SINGLE character token and skin. The other one is collect coins in a map that's unavailable unless I pay 500 gems. I love playing this game, but some objective and spawn tweaking would go a long way.

I love all of the new maps and characters. It makes the grinding a little easier. The challenges are fun and aren't always too hard, though they can be tedious. Its glitchy at time but that's easily overlooked. Most of the achievements are fun to unlock and some are impossibly hard. Characters can be worked towards over a long course of time and mission challenges are rewarding to complete.

I like the game. ... On a game built for speed, when you buy power-ups now takes forever. After the update on December 17th 2021, and you sell the items from your chest now takes forever. Before you could tap ten times very quick and you could sell 10 of them in two seconds. Now it takes 2 seconds to sell one, and if you have 10 of them we don't have that much time.

Never get tired of this game, and the updates and items continue to keep things interesting. At one point my phone was getting really slow from having too many apps installed, so I had to get rid of all of them. This was always the one game that I could never uninstall. Had it since it came out, and I'm still beating records and unlocking items. Edit: they added ads every two runs, and made more unlockables pay-to-play. Changed rating from 5 to 4 stars

I like Temple Run 2 more than the first version because there are more places to run and mor characters to choose from. There are things that weren't in the previous version like the rope at the starting of every run and chests to open and keys to unlock with. The only thin t.v.v that looks weird, nasty, and gross to me are the coins that are not in a good shape and I feel, there could be much better coins made with everything else so perfect.

I've been playing TR2 for a long time (2014) and I've noticed that the graphics have gone down hill some since the newer updates. You would think the graphics would improve but they got worse. However the gameplay is still fundamentally the same, except there is a jump bug that happens after the waterslide and minecart sections. I love this game and still play it regularly, just wish they would quit downgrading the graphics.

Still love the game and the ability to remove ads is great, but I really miss buying maps with gems or coins. Limiting maps to only bundles which include characters that I've already unlocked is punishing me for actually playing the game. There should be an unbundled option or a discount if I already have parts of the bundle, if you I can't go back to paying with in game currencies.

However, I'm basically stuck without the option for really making progress. I mean, yeah, one day I'll be able to afford to open the frozen shadows level, after collecting 500gems. It took me 4 months of saving gems to reach 160. Should take 12 more months to reach 500. I'd use the gem ability, but you have to be a certain level to unlock it, and i can't level up anymore because my achievements are all for frozen shadows, "score 500,000 on frozen shadow" & "collect all frozen relics"feels

I really enjoy this game for what it is.... A simple mindless pretty display which I can play when I'm trying to kill time. As others have mentioned, the creators need to add more advances to the game. There's a limited number of things that can be bought with coins and gems... Then there's nothing to achieve. Also there are a few things that can't be unlocked by earning them... You HAVE to pay for them. It's a well done game but there's nothing to keep one interested long term

The new updates are okay, but there are way too many ads now. I also miss the exciting gameplay from past updates, like the mine cart sections. The new environments and characters are fine, but they don't feel as innovative. The game is still fun, but the constant ads and lack of new mechanics are disappointing.

REALLY good base, but some things need improvement. This game has a LOT going for it, but could benefit from better graphics, more modes like a story mode with levels and different maps instead of the current ones being random ones unlocked by gems and being infinite, and even a proper leaderboard system that encourages players to play more. Ads are minimal which is good. Also could benefit from incorporating trends(Ex - 67, 2016 2.0). Hope to see a Temple Run 3 with these improvements! 999

This game brings me back memories, I used to live playing this as a child, because its adventurous, and it makes you feel like your exploring with the characters. This game also saves your progress. I definitely recommend this game, it brings so much potential.

this game is very fun. It changes its effects as per the festivals.This is the best thing,because the new themes seems very wonderful.And the exciting part of this game is the adventure.All I want to say is that they should also launch temple run 3 😁 🏃‍♂️

star_5.text: I've come back to this game multiple times. I'm always able to restore my progress, and there's something new every time. It may seem repetitive sometimes, but changing maps helps a lot, since they're more than just different appearances. There are way too many things to unlock, so completionists have something to look forward to. Is there a discord or somewhere we can talk about the game and maybe compare/ brag about scores?

Ads are ACTUALLY reasonable. They're not shoved in your face every few seconds. You actually get to CHOOSE whether to watch an ad or not revive; and if you get one anyway, there's a skip button once you watch 5 seconds. There's not even ONE ad though if you don't have Wi-Fi. At first the characters look lazily pasted, (like Scarlett Fox's eyes) but that can be forgiven when there's awesome ones (Karma's hood). The game works like subway surfer, but it's better. The maps are amazing, as far as mobile game graphics go. The controls, while a bit tricky at first, are easy to get the hang of. Overall, great game for those days when I'm bored.

This game truly has the best gameplay and rewards system of any game I've downloaded. It is challenging, but not impossible to the point of frustration. While you have the option of buying power-ups if you want the instant gratification, you can also earn enough to progress just by investing the time into the game. Ads are used sparingly and are generally not intrusive and do not disrupt game play. I wish other developers followed your lead!

Temple Run is one of my favorite mobile games of all time! I have been playing this game for many years - it is a fun way to focus and pass the time on airplanes or doctor's office. Graphics are cool. If you want extra stages/maps you will pretty much have to pay, as it is very difficult to get enough gems. Otherwise, objectives make it motivating to play, and you can choose boy or girl character. Great game

I did enjoy this game when it first came out, it's been a while but I stopped playing because of the bugs & glitches I kept encountering. maybe the devs have fixed them by now, when i get my new phone ill give it another shot!! 3/5 (4-10-2019) Updated... I gave it another try on my new phone & it worked perfect. I love Temple Run 2 as much as the 1st. Nothing bad to say. I unlocked 105 out of 107 achievements & own all characters & almost all maps. I've gotten pretty good at it!! 5/5

I'm a casual off/on player of games. The most important attribute of TR for me is the fact that it is ALWAYS ready to play: you don't have to wait 30 minutes or ish like that for lives to be restored, or have to buy them. I also like the fact that it is much much less of a "Pay to win" than some other Glitch-infested games - e.g. Angry Birds Pop. Don't get me wrong, like all games, it has it's surprises, but it's accessible and fun across ages.

This game actually is very meditative to me. I feel like it helps me regain my focus and gives me a sense of achievement when I unlock things. The maps are fun to explore and I enjoy the seasonal add ons, as well as the music. I hope they add more to the spooky summit map. I'm a big fan of Halloween. I come to this app when I also need a vacation from other stressors in my life.

This experience is amazing, worth purchasing the extra maps, and playing for about 6 years now! I love the events and also love the challenges. I've had to start separate accounts due to not saving my progress, but other than that it's good to grind again to the top. I do notice some bugs. I removed ads and sometimes the music disconnects when turning off my screen, which I have to restart the game to get it back. Other than that, keep up the amazing work. Thanks for the experience!

While I enjoy playing the game, I have found that the "Collect X Powerups" challenge doesn't always count. I have tried collecting the said number of various Powerups yet it doesn't seem to count. Please fix that. Great game to pass the time though. Would have loved if all characters had different abilities and stats unique to them rather than the same thing in different skins.

Recently had to replace an older tablet and when the Best Buy girls transfered the stuff from my old tablet all the characters transfered but all the points didn't. I had over 59 characters but some I earned are now having to be earned again. Plus all my gems which was over 30,000 didn't transfer. If it says collect power up no matter how many I pick up it says I haven't collected any. Really frustrating. I live the game. HELP !!!!!!! Still doesn't add my power ups

Upon getting a new device, my stats and currency were completely reset. However after contacting support, i was reimbursed and my gems/gold were returned to me. Overall the graphics are my favorite part of this game, it hardly lags, and gameplay is relatively smooth. Highly recommend. One thing I find silly is that a vault of gems (650) costs 50 dollars and a chalice of gems (110) costs 10 dollars, and maps cost 500 gems a piece. Meaning each map in the game is 40 dollars worth :/

Very good game, the change i would recommend is mixing up daily task. It appears they are in a loop, about every 4 days, the daily task repeats. Plus, make the daily task a little more difficult. Still recommend changing up the daily task and having something different. Unsure about the levels, I've been on the same level for almost a year. I recommend this game to all my friends. It really helps build your eye hand coordination.

I've played this game on and off for a few years now and while yes the ads after you inevitably die are annoying I understand they're doing it to earn ad revenue. Overall I genuinely have liked my experience playing Temple Run 2 along with the original Temple Run. It's a fun time killer and there is always something to do to keep the game from becoming stale and boring.

I've just got back for 2 weeks now, and I can't complain about the gameplay. The completionist in me is again keen on collecting all artifacts and hats there is. However, I would just like to raise a suggestion with the hats, because them having additional buff to whatever powerup you will be using, it is kind of a must to wear them if you want to have a good run. I just wish there was a way to turn off cosmetics without having to lose the buff.

It is great and outstanding game overall. Excellent UI and graphics feels very smooth and fluid. But now on my mobile despite 60 fps, the game looks a little rough or sticky. The touch response is excellent but I am talking about the game feels rough a bit, not so much. This roughness is visible if we look for it very attentively. I think it could be improved by cpu optimization. So please solve this problem. Thanks.

Temple Run 2 is an amazing and timeless endless runner game. The graphics are beautiful, the controls are smooth, and the gameplay is very exciting. New characters, locations, and events keep the game fresh and fun. It’s perfect for short breaks as well as long play sessions. No lag, very addictive, and great for all age groups. Highly recommended for anyone who loves fast-paced adventure games.

it is best game and it is not just a game it is my daily life but some times the temple pass provides same pet and not different other some pets are cannot be their because of providing same pets so it's disappointed me a lot plz provide different pet and it also can make more map like underwater, space, inside pyramid ,dinosaur and also other exiting maps those who are with me vote for this sign ♾️
I've been playing this for years and really enjoy it. The graphics are good. I like the way that it uses tilting my device to change lanes which I've found other continuous run games don't have.

I've had this game for at least 13 years!!! it has been awesome! I have every character and am in the ultra rare club and have all 107 accomplishments!!! i don't like how they put certain stuff on characters and you can't change it so now that character is attached to that accomplishment and you can't change them I have worked tirelessly to get all these characters and now they are locked in to that

it's a great game. I've been playing for more than 10 years and I really love it.But I have a problem in signing in to my game in my new android phone and don't know how to resume playing. I need help, thanks 🙏
